name: libqt5waylandcompositor5
title: libqt5waylandcompositor5
description:
QtWayland compositor library
QtWayland is a Qt 5 module that wraps the functionality of Wayland.
.
This package contains the QtWayland compositor library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libqt5waylandcompositor5 because QtWayland compositor library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libqt5waylandcompositor5 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libqt5waylandcompositor5 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libqt5waylandcompositor5 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
